item.title: A Developer's Introduction to Unraid
item.description: Unraid is a proprietary Linux-based operating system designed for home servers and small businesses. It’s known for its unique storage management system, which provides flexibility and data protection. You can use Unraid to run a variety of services, including web servers, databases, and CI/CD tools, all on a single machine.
